**Ayron del Valle Rodríguez**[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) (born 27 January 1989) is a Colombian professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [forward](/wiki/Forward_(association_football) "Forward (association football)") for [Categoría Primera A](/wiki/Categor%C3%ADa_Primera_A "Categoría Primera A") club [Alianza](/wiki/Alianza_Valledupar_F.C. "Alianza Valledupar F.C.").
